notes: Inverse of vault/backup/infinityops.json. Data path: cat <ts>.dump | ssh vps204 'docker exec -i infinityops-postgres pg_restore -c -U infinityops -d infinity_mie_prod'. Code path (when --include-code-rollback is set): the dispatcher prints the sec 77 cite, reads prev_sha from the latest vault/deploys/*_infinityops.md HEAD line, and invokes gh workflow run deploy-vps.yml --ref <prev_sha>. This INVOKES the canonical CD pipeline; it never reimplements 09_Provisioning/deploy_from_git.sh. Healthcheck mirrors the deploy curl-grep on the live br.jula token -- HTTP 200 alone is insufficient because a stale build still returns 200.
